cards.name: Graphify
cards.purpose: Explore code and document graph extraction for smaller task context packs.
cards.first_safe_use_case: Readonly graph map over a single task report folder with no external install in the task run.
cards.risk: Graph output can overstate dependency truth if not tied to source paths and hashes.
receipt_requirements: manual review note before canon admission

cards.name: State-machine discipline / XState pattern study
cards.purpose: Study state-machine patterns for task admission, gate transitions, and replayable workflow control.
cards.first_safe_use_case: Model a single task state transition ledger as a readonly design study.
cards.risk: Pattern adoption can add ceremony without improving gate proof.

cards.name: Public APIs Registry
cards.purpose: Create a vetted catalogue of public APIs for future tool and data integration tasks.
cards.first_safe_use_case: Offline candidate card import from documented API metadata without credentials or live calls.
cards.risk: API lists can contain stale endpoints, weak terms, or services that require credentials.

cards.name: Antares / database visibility candidate
cards.purpose: Evaluate database visibility for SQLite and evidence-index inspection workflows.
cards.first_safe_use_case: Readonly inspection of a task-local SQLite evidence fixture.
cards.risk: Database UI tools can mutate data or expose credentials if admitted without readonly controls.

cards.name: Crawl4AI
cards.purpose: Evaluate controlled web extraction for research bundles and source summaries.
cards.first_safe_use_case: Readonly extraction from a small approved URL allowlist with robots and attribution checks.
cards.risk: Crawler scope can expand unexpectedly and may produce copyright or attribution failures.

cards.name: SearXNG
cards.purpose: Evaluate metasearch as a controlled research ingress for dossier tasks.
cards.first_safe_use_case: Sandboxed query replay against a preconfigured local or approved endpoint with captured query and result receipts.
cards.risk: Search results can leak private queries or introduce unstable external claims.

cards.name: Wasmer sandbox candidate
cards.purpose: Evaluate WebAssembly sandbox execution for constrained tool trials.
cards.first_safe_use_case: Run a tiny deterministic fixture in an isolated sandbox with no filesystem mutation outside a temp output path.
cards.risk: Sandbox claims can be false if filesystem, network, and process boundaries are not independently checked.
